title: stetsonia coryne
intro: Stetsonia coryne, also known as the candle plant or Queen of the Night, is a cactus species native to the Atacama Desert in Chile. Traditionally, Stetsonia coryne has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Stetsonia coryne include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Stetsonia coryne typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
